program_chi: 專業會計學工商管理學士
learning_outcomes:
Professional Accountancy 1. Major Programme: Upon completion of the
Programme, students will: (1) have effective business communication
skills needed by accounting professionals (S); (2) be able to solve business problems by
analyzing, interpreting accounting, financial and other business information
(K/S); (3) have the ability to integrate
business knowledge and solve accounting problems in a business environment
(K/S); (4) understand and identify business
issues in a global environment (K/S); (5) be aware of the ethical issues in
relation to accounting practices (V). K = Knowledge outcomes S = Skills outcomes V = Values and attitudes outcomes
study_scheme:
Professional Accountancy Professional Accountancy Applicable to students admitted in 2024-25
Major Programme Requirement
Students are required to complete a minimum of 69 units
(72 units for Global Tax and Governance Stream / Finance for Accountants
Stream / Accounting Analytics Stream / Global Accounting Stream) of
courses as follows:

Explanatory Notes:
1.  |  ACCT courses at 2000 and above level (except those
marked with *) as well as those labeled as # will be included in the
calculation of Major GPA for honours classification if students
specialize in the respective streams.
2.  |  Apart from the above Major Programme Requirement,
students are required to take at least 6 units of free elective courses
not offered by the Faculty of Business Administration or not used to
fulfill any minor programmes offered by the Faculty.

Major Programme Requirement (for Associate
Degree holders admitted to senior-year places)
Students are required to complete a minimum of 58
units (61 units for Global Tax and Governance Stream / Finance for
Accountants Stream / Accounting Analytics Stream) of courses as follows:
Units
1.  |  Faculty Package:  |  6
DOTE1030, 1040
2.  |  Required Courses:  |  43
ACCT3003, 3111, 3112, 3121, 3142, 3151, 3152, 3161, 4001
(capstone course), 4111, 4131, DOTE2011#, FINA2010#, MGNT4010#, MKTG2010#
3.  |  Elective Courses:  |  9
9 units from the following:
ACCT3005, 3241, 4211, 4212, 4213, 4221, 4231, 4232, 4242,
4243, 4244, 4251, 4252, 4253, 4261, 4262, 4263, 4271, 4272, 4281, 4282,
4290*, DOTE3010#, MATH1610, 1620
Total:  |  58
Global Tax and Governance Stream
3.  |  Elective Courses:  |  12
12 units from the following:
(a)  |  at least 2 courses from:
ACCT4261, 4262, 4263
(b)  |  at least 1 course from:
ACCT4251, 4252, 4253, 4271, 4272
Total:  |  61
Finance for Accountants Stream
3.  |  Elective/Stream-specific Courses:  |  12
12 units from the following:

(b)  |  2 courses from:
ACCT4251, 4282, FINA3010#, 3020#, 3030#, 4040#,
4050#, 4110#
Total:  |  61
Accounting Analytics Stream
3.  |  Elective/Stream-specific Courses:  |  12
12 units from the following:
(a)  |  ACCT4242
(b)  |  3 courses from:
ACCT3241, 4213, 4232, 4243, 4244, DOTE2021#, 4020#,
4070#, 4110#, 4220#, 4260#
Total:  |  61
Explanatory Notes:
1.  |  ACCT courses at 2000 and above level (except those
marked with *) as well as those labeled as # will be included in the
calculation of Major GPA for honours classification if students
specialize in the respective streams.
2.  |  Subject to the approval of the Chairpersons/Directors
of the Departments/Schools offering the courses, students may be exempted
from up to 3 required courses at 1000 or 2000 level but NOT the units on
the strength of the courses completed in AD programmes. No course
exemption will be granted to courses at 3000 and above level. If
exemption is granted to some of the required courses, students are
required, at the full discretion of the Director of the School of
Accountancy, to complete other major electives or courses at 3000 and
above level offered by the Faculty of Business Administration so as to
fulfill the unit requirement of the programme.
